mapper.select:
SELECT id, task_code, version, task_name, report_id, report_code, cron_expression, recipients, cc_recipients, export_format, filter_params, last_run_time, next_run_time, run_count, fail_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted FROM rpt_schedule_task WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND (task_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR task_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR report_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY status DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, task_code, version, task_name, report_id, report_code, cron_expression, recipients, cc_recipients, export_format, filter_params, last_run_time, next_run_time, run_count, fail_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted FROM rpt_schedule_task WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND next_run_time IS NOT NULL AND next_run_time <= #{now} ORDER BY next_run_time ASC
